nasb.text: But Daniel said to the overseer whom the commander of the officials had appointed over Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael and Azariah,

esv.text: Then Daniel said to the steward whom the chief of the eunuchs had assigned over Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, and Azariah,

cnv.text: 後來但以理對太監長分派看管但以理、哈拿尼雅、米沙利、亞撒利雅的人說：

ccb.text: 但以理便对太监长派来监管他、哈拿尼雅、米沙利和亚撒利雅的人说：
